feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HANA alert id 128 Users found enabled to use LDAP Authentication but without enabling SSL for client
entry.content:
Hi all,

Does anyone know what the hana alert id 128 "Users found enabled to use LDAP Authentication but without enabling SSL for client connections" really means?
Where can I find the related sql statement for this alert?
Unfortunately, I couldn't find anything about that.

Thanks in advance and Best Regards,
Norman

entry.title: Inquiry regarding System-Based Assessment resources and exam protocols
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

I am preparing for the new System-based certification assessment and have a few questions regarding the format and resources.

I found the instructional video for the Scenario-based assessment very helpful. Is there a similar video guide planned for the System-based assessment? If so, when can we expect it to be released?

Additionally, could you please clarify the following regarding the exam experience:

  1. Instructions: Will I receive the exercise instructions via email prior to the exam, or will they only be visible within the exam interface once I begin?

  2. System Access: How is the connection to the live system established? Do I need to install any specific software, or is it entirely browser-based?

  3. Proctoring: Does this assessment format involve screen monitoring or active proctoring, or is it completely unproctored?

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,

entry.title: Production Engineer
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am reaching out as a new community member seeking a guide on which SAP product is befitting of a production engineer. I have an experience using SAP HANA S/4 PM organized by my company (in-house).

I would like to get certified by SAP directly or affiliates in all SAP products relating to production and process engineering and become a SME.

PS: I am working presently in Saudi Arabia

Thanks for your assistance.

Cheers.

entry.title: ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINTにおける「FOR <sql_statement>」の指定方法について
entry.content:
現在、現行環境と比較して新環境の処理時間が遅く、業務に支障が生じており、
新環境を本番稼働できない可能性があるという大きな課題があります。
 
このため、処理時間が遅いSQL文に対してHINT句を指定する方法について調査を行っています。
 
SAP Note DIGITS の「6. 文のヒントはどのように管理できますか。」にて、
以下のSQLコマンドの説明があることを確認しました。
ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINT ( <hints> ) [OVERRIDE] [COMMENT '<comment>'] FOR <sql_statement>
 
本コマンドについて、以下の２点をご教示いただけますでしょうか。
 
１．FOR <sql_statement> の <sql_statement> には、STATEMENT HASH ではなく、SQL文そのものを指定することは可能でしょうか。
 
２．（上記 1 において SQL文を指定可能な場合）
　　<sql_statement> に、以下の例のように % などのワイルドカードを指定することは可能でしょうか。
　　目的としては、1回のコマンドで複数のSQL文に対してHINT句を指定できるかを確認したいと考えています。
 
　　ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINT ( USE_HEX_PLAN ) FOR 'SELECT % FROM "Z_CDS_VIEW_A" WHERE %'
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I want to confirm the value of LASTCHANGE_DATE in the table CRHD can not be set 00000000?
entry.content:
Now I have a question.
I want to use the LASTCHANGE_DATETIME as a condition to research the newest data.
But I am not sure the value of the LASTCHANGE_DATETIME in the table CRHD must be set.

If LASTCHANGE_DATETIME must be set by system date and time , 
I can use it as a condition to research the newest data.
for example 
 Select * from CRHD where LASTCHANGE_DATETIME >= last execute date time.

entry.title: How to force exact result recoding within QM Inspection Lot?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we have Hana system with SAPK-10701INS4CORE.

I can enter a value like ">100,5" as result within result recording for an inspection lot.

How and where can I change the data to force exact result recording using TCode QA02?

thanks in advance.

entry.title: API Purchase Order Item Note
entry.content:
I would like to use the API_PURCHASEORDER_2 odatav4 API to mass upload the item long text on purchase Order.

Following documentation on api.sap.com and help.sap.com I was able to create a note on the Purchase Order Item. However, it appends to existing text, it doesn't overwrite. Is there a way to overwrite?

Thank you

Julien

entry.title: Facing the issue while trying to do the full load for the CDS View of table DBTABLOG in Q
entry.content:
Hi,
I am facing a issue while trying to do the full load for the CDS View entity- YMTC_C_C_DBTABLOG of table DBTABLOG in Quality.
This issue is raised by Extraction team.
It was working fine in dev environment but it is displaying this warning in the Quality environment

when we tried to do the full load again.
Is there any way we can resolve this?

entry.title: Field combination assignment to condition contract type
entry.content:
Hello,

It is defined new business volume field combination. But I can not restrict field combination, just want to see Z ones.

I created and assigned Z combination but it can not be restricted.

 

when ı configured 0c01 combination, it works. How to assign z field combination to our Z-contract type?

entry.title: Bank swift key update file setup automation
entry.content:
Hi  Experts ,

we have a requirement to automate bank swift key updation file .

Config between NIOFI and SAP Where File will be pick up from NIOFI system and placed in SAP application server in one folder (through some program ) Creation of several variants to process the file  then archiving of the same file .

is there any standard SAP program to do this automation .

kindly suggest .

entry.title: Value differences are posted solely to stock account in multiple line invoices
entry.content:
Hi,

in sap, for invoice with multiple line items, line by line quantity is checked against the stock in the time of posting.

This leads to that if there are differences they are posted to stock account instead of the line quantities being accumulated and then posted proportionally to stock account and expense.

How did you tackle this issue in your company?

Thanks,

Golan

entry.title: how to reverse the client copy
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to ask how to reverse the client copy action? I used transaction code SCC9N to perform a remote client copy with the profile SAP_CUST. Originally, I only wanted to overwrite the configuration from the production environment to the test environment, but I didn’t expect it to clear all the business data in the test environment. Is there any way to restore it?

entry.title: HANA Client Version Impact on HANABulkCopy Performance
entry.content:
I am using SAP Business One 10.0 for SAP HANA FP 2505 with the following environment:

  • SAP HANA 2.0 Enterprise Edition SPS 05 Revision 2.00.059.09.1686579463 (fa/hana2sp05)
  • SAP HANA Client version 2.17.22
  • SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP5

I am encountering an unexpected performance issue when using HANABulkCopy from the SAP HANA ADO.NET library to copy data from a .NET DataTable into an SAP HANA column table.

Issue

With SAP HANA Client 2.17.22, running HANABulkCopy takes 30–40 minutes, even when inserting only 2 rows, and sometimes the operation times out.

What I tried

I installed a newer SAP HANA Client version 2.27.19, and with the exact same code and table:

  • Inserting 2 rows or even 20,000 rows now takes only 1–2 seconds.
  • No timeouts occur.
  • Performance is consistently stable.

My question

The SAP Business One Administrator’s Guide for SAP HANA recommends using SAP HANA Client version 2.17.22 for this B1 version.

So I am trying to understand:

  • Why does version 2.17.22 cause such extreme delays with HANABulkCopy?
  • Why does upgrading to 2.27.19 immediately resolve the issue, even though it is not the version officially recommended for SAP Business One?

Has anyone else experienced this behavior with HANABulkCopy on older HANA Client versions?
Is there any known limitation, bug, or compatibility issue with 2.17.22 that would explain this performance drop?

Any guidance or insights would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Account code which is used in foreign currency valuation <FAG_FCV>
entry.content:
Hi all,
I would like to ask about Account code which is posted by FAGL_FCV automatically.
When I execute FAGL_FCV, SAP will automatically calculate valuation gain or loss and post using specific account code.
I want to change the specific account code which is automatically used by "Valuation area".
Unfortunately, our SAP do not have <Define Accounts for Realized/Unrealized Exchange Rate Differences> in SPRO.
In stead of that we have <Prepare Automatic Postings for Foreign Currency Valuation> but it only can separate account code by "Chart o Accounts".
We need to use only one "Chart of Accounts" so it is difficult to use the field....

Do you know if it is possible?

entry.title: SAP Business One System Requirements for HANA and SQL Versions
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing SAP Business One (on-premise) for our clients, both HANA and SQL Server versions.

We understand that for SAP Business One on HANA, the typical minimum requirements is 64 GB RAM. It is just information. We are not aware of any clear hardware sizing guidelines. Plus, we only know certified servers list, it means we cannot install SAP Business One on other servers? 

Could you please advise on the exact system requirements and sizing parameters for both versions?
Additionally, is there any official sizing template or calculator available to estimate the overall hardware requirements?

 


SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Business One @Darius

entry.title: Planned expense for the expense which is being consisted of Standard cost
entry.content:
In CO-PA report <Tr-cd: KEPM>, it is possible to check plannd amount for expenses.
One of the expenses which are able to check is the expense which is being consisted of Standard cost (e.g. Direct material cost, Machine process cost etc...).
The expenses are calculated automatically based on the followng formula:
Standrad cost whose Costing Variant is ZPC1　×　Planned produced quantity
However, only specific Version of Planning levels, we would like to use Standrad cost whose Costing Variant is YPC1, not ZPC1.
Do you know if it is possible?

entry.title: How to switch off E-Mail notifcation for flexible workflow?
entry.content:
Hi, I have got the problem that I cannot simply switch off the email notification for flexible workflow for sales objects. I have copied the email template for the sales order to xx_02000006_CRT_9 and the email is sent out correctly, whenever an approval is required. But I have got the problem, that I want to test the email notification in our test system. And we are using real users with real email adresses within our company. So we want to test, but we don't want to bother the colleagues with many unnecessary emails from our test system all the time.
That's why I would like to have the possibility to easily switch off the email notification. Either depending on the function group or on the  workflow object. Currently I have only the possibility to delete the user defined email template xx_02000006_CRT_9. And transport the changes to our test system. I could not find any customiziable flag, to stop sending emails. Could someone please give me a hint?
The other question is: the emails are sent out immediately as high priority. That's why I cannot stop the from sending in transaction SOST. Is there any way to change it to low priority, so that they are not sent immediately?
Thanks for your help
Gaby

entry.title: Instance for Data Attribute Recommendation cannot be created
entry.content:
Hello, wanted to try out Data Attribute Recommendation in SAP Hana Trial account. In December it was working fine, but when I tried again in February, Instance creation is stuck. Creating service Data Attribute Recommendation takes a long time, about a day, after which an error occurs that the wait time has been exceeded.

Steps to recreate:

  1. Created SAP Hana trial.
  2. Created AWS US-east subaccount.
  3. Used either Booster to set up account for Data Attribute Recommendation or created service manually (tried with different Runtime Environments, and each time subaccount was deleted and created anew)
  4. After near a day long wait, error occurs about waiting time being exceeded

entry.title: ATC Execution in HANA 2025 does not show any results
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are converting ECC to S/4 HANA 2025.

After conversion we have setup ATC to check all the findings in all our custom objects. Using the latest simplification DB and have set up ATC like we did in our previous projects, but somehow after executing ATC we don't see any results at all.

In our previous projects, where we are on HANA 2023, ATC works perfectly fine. Is there any difference between HANA 2023 and HANA 2025 from ATC perspective?

Any insights would be highly appreciated as we are running out of options now and not able to  proceed with the custom code remediation.

Regards,

Pankaj Agarwal

entry.title: Initial App Update Taking Long - (Standard SSAM v2511.0.0 // SSAM v2505/2405 on S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently, we are accessing the SAP Service Asset Manager standard application(v2511.0.0) on S/4HANA. After scanning the app QR code, the initial app update has been taking a long time, and the app update pop-up is also delayed.

• S/4HANA
• SSAM versions: 2405 and 2505
• Standard client application version: 2511.0.0



Could you please advise how we can resolve this issue? Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Kingston A.

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One
